title: Mary In The Junkyard Announce Debut Album Role Model Hermit: Hear “Crash Landing”
author: Danielle Chelosky

The post Mary In The Junkyard Announce Debut Album <em>Role Model Hermit</em>: Hear “Crash Landing” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Since 2022, Mary In The Junkyard have been making what they describe as "angry weepy chaos rock." Today, the UK trio is finally announcing their debut album, Role Model Hermit, arriving this summer. The lead single "Crash Landing" is here now.

"It's about fear and how men often rely on keeping their emotions secret, and how you have to crack them open," bandleader Clari-Freeman Taylor says about the song. "To be the only one that’s seeing one side of someone, it's trapping."

Role Model Hermit follows their 2024 EP This Old House and it was produced by Oli Bayston. "Crash Landing" comes with a music video directed by Maisy Banks and Jacob Ray; watch below.

TRACKLIST:
01 "Mantra III"
02 "Blood"
03 "Seek And Destroy"
04 "New Muscles"
05 "Myrtle"
06 "Peter The Dog"
07 "Crash Landing"
08 "Welcome Break"
09 "Candelabra"
10 "Thou Shalt Sprout"
11 "Mouse"

TOUR DATES:
07/02 – Kingston, UK @ Banquet Records
07/03 – Brighton, UK @ Resident
07/04 – London, UK @ Rough Trade East
07/05 – Bristol, UK @ Rough Trade Bristol
07/06 – Nottingham, UK @ Rough Trade Nottingham
07/07 – Liverpool, UK @ Rough Trade Liverpool
07/08 – Leeds, UK @ Vinyl Whistle
07/09 – Manchester, UK @ HMV Manchester
07/10 – Glasgow, UK @ Assai Glasgow

Role Model Hermit is out 7/3 via AMF. Pre-order it here.

Daisy & Tomos Ayscough
